name: Severe early-onset obesity
relevant_disorders: Significant early-onset obesity with or without other endocrine features and short stature
Significant early-onset obesity +/- other endocrine features and short stature

types.name: GMS Rare Disease Virtual
types.description: This is a panel for the Genomic Medicine Service for an exome/genome/panel based test that requires a virtual gene panel for rare disease in the Test Directory.

types.name: GMS Rare Disease
types.description: This panel type is used for GMS panels that are not virtual (i.e. could be a wet lab test)

types.name: GMS signed-off
types.description: This panel has undergone review by a NHSE GMS disease specialist group and processes to be signed-off for use within the GMS.
